stemHtml: What is correct regarding the “vibrating rod” ice detection system during icing?

options.a: It automatically activates anti-icing on accumulation of ice.
options.b: It accrues ice that may be seen from the cockpit windows.
options.c: It accrues ice that is visible from cockpit instruments.
options.d: It alerts the crew to icing with a light in the cockpit.
